layout_rules: Use a left concept block and a right hero object.
Keep one dominant runtime object, not multiple equal cards.
Reserve top-left for the main framing statement.
alignment_rules: Left and right columns should share a top alignment line.
Right hero object should align to the right column, not float independently.
Do not mix symmetric outer bounds with asymmetric inner content.

image_usage.placement_guidance: Place the runtime object in the right column and let it dominate the page authority.

highlight_grammar: Use orange for labels or attention cues.
Use cyan for system or execution emphasis.
Keep backgrounds low-contrast so the hero object remains dominant.
anti_patterns: hero object with no supporting explanation
reuse_notes: The anchor object can become a control plane, console, or runtime map.
Preserve asymmetry and object dominance when adapting to new topics.
